system: small-strain linear elastic bar in axial extension coordinate

practical: strain gauge, displacement probe, or load-frame extension measurement

regime_assumptions: bending, shear, plasticity, and damping are outside this card
coordinate_note: The coordinate is total axial extension, not strain. If strain epsilon = delta_L / L0 is used as the coordinate, the Hessian changes to E_young A_cross L0.

module_object.description: scalar axial stiffness Hessian for a uniform linear elastic bar

derivation_status: exact from the stated small-strain uniform linear elastic energy

ceiling_or_reference.description: no hidden coordinate is declared in this card

positive_scope: This card exposes material stiffness as the same scalar quadratic contact type as an ideal spring after geometry is declared.
boundary: It does not describe plastic deformation, nonlinear elasticity, bending modes, shear, damping, or fracture.
failure_mode: The attachment fails if the bar leaves the small-strain elastic regime or if deformation is not well represented by a single axial extension coordinate.
next_measurement: Measure axial load and extension in the elastic regime to estimate E_young A_cross / L0.
